title: Down Entity
text: Down Entity A Down Entity is an Inner Entity that represents the many side in a one-to-many relationship with the outer entity. By default, Uniface supports full create, read, update, and delete operations on both entities. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: ent Main Development Object? No Part of: Component Entity ( Outer Entity ) Contains: Component Entity , Component Field , Label , Property , Code Container Generalization: Component Entity , Inner Entity , Many Entity Specializations: — Compilation Output: — Specialization Down Entity specializes Inner Entity in that it references a Many Entity.
